description: Dev infra startup past PMF, scaling GTM. Strong inbound funnel plus founder-led outbound to strategic accounts.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Distributed-cache-as-a-service. Usage-based billing. PMF confirmed via 40%+ WoW usage growth on the free tier. Founder does 3-4 outbound deals/month to strategic accounts above $5k MRR; rest is self-serve.
